Message: The only valid options are 5, 6, or 10.

SM-A-0001 violated. Don't send the SET_MODE command with arguments: SYS_TEST, SYS_LAUNCH_PRE_SEP, SYS_LAUNCH_POST_SEP, SYS_JOI, OR with any argument while in these modes (as they should not nominally be left during the launch or JOI activities).
Do not send the command READ_CHECKSUM with end address (end_addr) greater than 0xFFFF_FFEF.
Wing current limit must be enabled and configured to the default, 10A limit.
